data.title: U.S. Stocks and Crypto Sector Experience Broad Rebound
data.description:
U.S. stocks closed higher, marking a positive day for the financial markets. According to NS3.AI, the Dow Jones Industrial Average increased by 0.66%, while the S&P 500 gained 0.54%. The Nasdaq Composite also saw an uptick, adding 0.77% to its value.

In the cryptocurrency sector, Solana (HSDT) experienced a notable rise, increasing by 7.46%. This broad rebound in both stocks and cryptocurrencies indicates a renewed investor confidence across these markets.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold and Silver Prices Rise Amid European Stock Decline
data.description: Gold prices increased to $4,534.53 per ounce, marking a 0.61% intraday rise. Silver also saw gains, climbing to $71.389. According to NS3.AI, major European stock indices experienced a slight decline. Additionally, BVIX and EVIX both decreased by approximately 1.6% intraday, while WTI and Brent crude prices showed modest upward movement.

data.title: Large Ethereum Withdrawal from FalconX Raises Speculation
data.description: A new wallet address, 0xA177566863eB86A9699CDA8E6603fb7ab2367dc9, withdrew 50,000 ETH, valued at $108 million, from FalconX four hours ago, analyst @ai_9684xtpa posted on X. Observers speculate that Bitmine might be behind this transaction, as they have a history of withdrawing Ethereum from FalconX using new addresses. The transaction has attracted attention due to its size and the potential involvement of Bitmine.

data.title: Newrails Launches MiCA-Compliant Euro Stablecoin on Monad
data.description: Newrails, an electronic money institution regulated by the Bank of Lithuania, has announced the launch of a MiCA-compliant euro stablecoin, EURW, on the Monad platform. According to ChainCatcher, Newrails holds dual licenses as a Lithuanian Electronic Money Institution (EMI) and a Czech Virtual Asset Service Provider (VASP). Each EURW token is backed 1:1 by euro reserves, allowing token holders to exchange them for fiat euros without fees at any time. The stablecoin aims to provide production-grade infrastructure for Web3 developers, payment developers, and RWA teams.

data.title: Henkel in Advanced Negotiations to Acquire Olaplex Hair-Care Brand
data.description:
Henkel is reportedly in advanced discussions to acquire Olaplex, a hair-care brand known for its popular shampoos and treatments. Bloomberg posted on X, citing sources familiar with the matter, that the German consumer goods company is looking to expand its portfolio with this acquisition. Olaplex has gained a significant following for its innovative hair-care products, which have become a staple in salons and households alike.

The potential acquisition aligns with Henkel's strategy to strengthen its presence in the beauty and personal care sector. Olaplex's unique formulations have contributed to its rapid growth and popularity, making it an attractive target for Henkel. The deal, if finalized, would mark a significant move for Henkel in the competitive hair-care market.

Henkel has been actively pursuing growth opportunities in the beauty industry, and acquiring Olaplex would enhance its product offerings and market reach. The negotiations are ongoing, and further details about the transaction have not been disclosed. Henkel's interest in Olaplex underscores the brand's strong market position and the increasing demand for specialized hair-care solutions.

data.title: Crypto stocks rebounded across the board at the close of trading in the US, with Solana (HSDT) rising more than 7%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.66%, the S&P 500 rose 0.54%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.77%. The crypto sector saw broad gains, with Solana rising 7.46%, Circle rising 2.66%, Strategy (MSTR) rising 2.11%, Bitmine rising 2.12%, SharpLink rising 1.53%, and Coinbase rising 0.03%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Federal Reserve Chair Nominee Aims to Reduce Central Bank's Balance Sheet
data.description: Federal Reserve Chair nominee Kevin Warsh has expressed intentions to substantially reduce the U.S. central bank's $6.6 trillion balance sheet. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that achieving this goal may require more than one term, as suggested by a leading financial economist. Warsh's approach reflects a strategic shift in monetary policy, aiming to address concerns over the expansive balance sheet. The economist emphasized the complexity and time required to implement such changes, indicating that Warsh's tenure could be pivotal in shaping the future of the Federal Reserve's financial strategies.

data.title: Precious metals strengthened while European stock indices faced pressure; traditional financial assets showed divergent trends.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices rose to $4,534.53 per ounce, a daily increase of 0.61%. Silver prices rose to $71.389 per ounce, a daily increase of 0.26%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 51.54, a daily decrease of 1.60%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 74.00, a daily decrease of 1.62%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate rose 0.09% to 6.90807. The USD/JPY exchange rate rose 0.08% to 159.499. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 fell 0.15% to 5,632.68 points; the UK FTSE 100 fell 0.17% to 10,086.49 points; and the German DAX 40 fell 0.20% to 22,874.89 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil rose 0.05% to $92.02 per barrel, while Brent crude oil rose 0.17% to $102.34 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Japan's 2-Year Government Bond Yield Hits Highest Level Since 1996
data.description: Japan's 2-year government bond yield has risen to 1.315%, marking its highest level since 1996. According to Jin10, this increase reflects ongoing shifts in the country's economic landscape and monetary policy adjustments. The rise in yield is indicative of investor sentiment and expectations regarding inflation and interest rates in Japan. As the government navigates these financial changes, the bond market continues to be a focal point for economic observers.

data.title: Japan Urged to Consider Naval Deployment in Strait of Hormuz
data.description: Japan is being urged to contemplate deploying warships to the Strait of Hormuz to collaborate with other nations in securing the vital waterway, according to a former top national security adviser. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the strategic importance of the Strait of Hormuz, through which a significant portion of the world's oil supply passes. The suggestion comes amid ongoing tensions in the region, with the former adviser emphasizing the need for proactive measures even before a ceasefire is achieved. The proposal underscores the critical role of international cooperation in maintaining stability and security in key global maritime routes.

data.title: STOCKS | Hong Kong Stocks Open Lower as Kuaishou and CATL Decline
data.description: Hong Kong's stock market opened lower today, with the Hang Seng Index falling by 0.27% and the Hang Seng Tech Index dropping by 0.68%. According to Jin10, Kuaishou shares plummeted over 9.5%, while Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. Ltd. (CATL) saw a decline of more than 2.5%. Additionally, ZTO Express shares decreased by over 2%. In contrast, JD.com shares rose by 2.5%.

data.title: HDFC Bank Chairman Resigns Over Ethical Concerns
data.description: HDFC Bank's chairman has stepped down, citing practices that conflicted with his personal ethics and values. Bloomberg posted on X that turbulence is becoming more common among India's leading companies. The chairman's departure highlights ongoing challenges within the country's corporate sector, raising questions about governance and ethical standards. This incident adds to a series of recent events that have affected the reputation of India's most respected firms.

data.title: TRUMP Token Transfer Raises Speculation on Exchange Deposits
data.description: The team responsible for TRUMP tokens has moved 6.97 million TRUMP, valued at $23.18 million, into a BitGo custody wallet. According to NS3.AI, this transaction has led to speculation about potential future deposits to centralized exchanges.

data.title: U.S. Central Command: USS Abraham Lincoln Conducts Operations in Regional Waters
data.description: The U.S. Central Command has announced that the USS Abraham Lincoln aircraft carrier is currently navigating regional waters while continuing to carry out strikes on military targets within Iran. According to Jin10, these operations are part of ongoing efforts to address security concerns in the area. The presence of the aircraft carrier underscores the United States' commitment to maintaining stability and responding to potential threats in the region.

data.title: Trump's team transferred $23.18 million to a BitGo escrow wallet.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, the Trump Meme Token team (3S7zw...d9D) sent 6.97 million Trump tokens, worth $23.18 million, to the BitGo custodial wallet. The team may deposit them into a centralized exchange, as they have done before.

data.title: The compromise proposal for the crypto market structure bill has sparked industry divisions, with Coinbase expressing dissatisfaction with the stablecoin yield terms.
data.description: The compromise proposed by US senators this week regarding the stablecoin rewards section of the Clarity Act has sparked mixed reactions within the crypto industry. Coinbase has expressed its dissatisfaction with the latest compromise text to senators' staff but has not yet publicly stated its opposition. The proposal was presented to crypto industry stakeholders on Monday, with some expressing dissatisfaction while others said the outcome was better than expected. The proposal would instruct some regulatory agencies to develop rules to clarify the regulatory approach for rewards-based activities, but industry concerns exist that regulators might set subjective standards. Furthermore, the text could limit companies' ability to link rewards to the volume of stablecoin transactions. During an industry conference call this week, Coinbase diverged from other stakeholders, with some companies arguing that giving up certain stablecoin rewards is too costly, while others believe that losing the Clarity Act poses a greater risk to the overall legislative framework of the crypto industry. Previously, news of the compromise had already impacted the market, with Circle's stock price falling 20% ​​on Tuesday before recovering slightly on Wednesday. White House crypto advisor Patrick Witt criticized related predictions on the X platform as "uninformed" and stated that "everything will be resolved." The final text is expected to be released by the end of this week or early next week.

data.title: XT.COM will launch BPUSDT and BSBUSDT USDT USDT perpetual contracts.
data.description: XT.COM will simultaneously launch BPUSDT and BSBUSDT U-margined perpetual contracts on March 26, 2026 at 14:00 (UTC+8), both supporting up to 10x leverage. It is understood that BPUSDT and BSBUSDT contracts do not currently support order placement. XT stated that it will continue to launch more contract trading pairs and related promotions in the future.

data.title: BlackRock President Warns of Economic Risks from Iran Conflict
data.description: BlackRock President Rob Kapito has expressed concerns that investors might be underestimating the economic risks associated with the ongoing conflict in Iran. Bloomberg posted on X that Kapito believes these tensions could negatively impact growth and increase inflation, even if the conflict is resolved quickly. Kapito's remarks highlight the potential long-term economic implications of geopolitical instability, urging investors to consider these factors in their financial strategies.

data.title: Federal Housing Finance Agency Urges DOJ to Investigate New York Mortgages
data.description: Federal Housing Finance Agency Director Bill Pulte has reached out to the U.S. Department of Justice, urging prosecutors to examine mortgages associated with New York Attorney General Letitia James for potential fraud. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of this request. The investigation seeks to uncover any fraudulent activities linked to these mortgages, reflecting ongoing scrutiny in the housing finance sector. The move underscores the agency's commitment to ensuring transparency and accountability in mortgage dealings.
